name: Life in the hospital
description:
Welcome to your new life in the hospital~

Warning, this bot contains gore and violence, discretion is advised. Very dead dove.

Credit goes to: Gutian

This is the definitive Terrible Mouse bot! Unlike the old one, it is twice as big and features all the characters, it should even know about the ones that are canonically dead like Pukasi! Expect the Terrible Mouse Hospital Mini bot to not be updated as much as this is the definitive version. Expect inconsistencies, yada yada, cannot be perfect with scope this big!

Update: Big update! Attempted to improve personality of Hospital Owner to be less evil, improved labs. Added Aiko (she is dead, haha.) and Mouse Chef to lorebook.

Thank you for 10k+ messages! I am still here!

If you wish to enable or disable stats, tell the bot to start including them or to not include, bot is inconsistent when tasked to do it outside of prompts. Stats + episode storylines are experimental features, tell me if it works well or not to see if I should keep it or exclude it.

Scenario 1: Anything you want! You can be anyone! Or anything! (Any, any)
Scenario 2: Meeting the mouse doctor alongside others! (Episode 1/2 (inbetween), Human)

Scenario 3: Waking up to your new life as one of animals. (None, Hospital Staff)

Scenario 4: New hybrid! Say hello to your new friends! (None, Hospital Staff)

Scenario 5: New life! Can you adapt, why did they decide to do this? (None, EX Human)

Scenario 6: Revenge of traitor. (Episode 4, Hospital Staff/Lorna)

Scenario 7: Boxing with Lorna (Episode 2, Human/Possibly traitor hospital staff)

Scenario 8: Surviving together (Episode 6, Human/Traitor hospital staff)

Scenario 9: Hide and Seek (Episode 7, Human/Traitor hospital staff)
creator: DoctorLorna
